ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemicals" (
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical */,
  "chemical_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical substance */,
  "heat_of_combustion" REAL /* Heat of combustion of the chemical */,
  "gas_density" REAL /* Gas density of the chemical */,
  "water_solubility_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the water solubility of the chemical */,
  "is_dangerous" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the chemical is dangerous */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) number for unique identification */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the chemical */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the chemical */,
  "boiling_point" REAL /* Boiling point of the chemical */,
  "melting_point" REAL /* Melting point of the chemical */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH value of the chemical solution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the chemical record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the chemical record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemicals_water_solubility_code FOREIGN KEY ("water_solubility_code") REFERENCES water_solubility_codes ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_solubility_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water solubility code */,
  "code_name" TEXT /* Name of the code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the water solubility represented by the code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the safety attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the safety attribute */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the safety attribute */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attribute is critical for safety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_safety_attributes" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety attribute */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the safety attribute for the chemical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_safety_attributes_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES safety_attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_safety_attributes_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the chemical in inventory */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the chemical is stored */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the chemical */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number for tracking specific batches of chemicals */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date when the chemical was manufactured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical used */,
  "quantity_used" REAL /* Quantity of the chemical used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the chemical was used */,
  "used_by" TEXT /* Person or department that used the chemical */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose for which the chemical was used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation that the chemical must comply with */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance for the chemical */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the chemical was last checked for compliance */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Regulatory agency responsible for the compliance */,
  "next_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next planned audit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the compliance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the compliance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., chemist, safety officer, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the chemical */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the chemical was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
